Meeting Notes - March 2026
==========================
1. Project deadline moved to April 15th
2. New team member starting next week: Sarah
3. Budget approved for cloud infrastructure
4. Weekly standups changed to 10:00 AM
5. Code review process needs improvement
6. Consider migrating to microservices
7. Performance benchmarks due by end of month
8. Security audit scheduled for next quarter

TODO List

[ ] Deploy staging environment
[ ] Refactor database queries
[ ] Add error handling to payment flow
[ ] Schedule team retrospective
[ ] Update dependencies to latest versions

# WebLinux Project
A browser-based Linux terminal simulator.
## Features
- Virtual file system
- 50+ commands
- Pipes and redirections
- Process management

server:
  host: 0.0.0.0
  port: 8080
  workers: 4
logging:
  level: info
  format: json

CC=gcc
CFLAGS=-Wall -O2
TARGET=app

all: $(TARGET)

clean:
	rm -f *.o $(TARGET)

.PHONY: all clean

# ~/.bashrc
export PATH="/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin"
alias ll="ls -la"
alias la="ls -a"
